title: $USE_EXTRA_JIS_CHARS
text: $USE_EXTRA_JIS_CHARS Keep extra Japanese characters for compatibility. $USE_EXTRA_JIS_CHARS { = } 1 | 0 Arguments 1 —use extra Japanese characters. This is the default value. 0 —don't use extra Japanese characters. Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 1 Description For a Japanese environment, Uniface supports characters of JIS X 0208, NEC special characters, NEC selection of IBM extensions, and IBM extensions (only supported on Shift-JIS). In addition, Uniface supports some extra characters for compatibility reasons. If you don't want to use those extra characters, set $USE_EXTRA_JIS_CHARS to 0 . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
